name: Utah vs Idaho workers comp for hearing loss—which better?
description: Utah stricter SOL; both viable with proof.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: Utah vs Idaho workers comp for hearing loss—which better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah stricter SOL; both viable with proof.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Similar scheduled benefits, but Utah's 1-yr SOL stricter than Idaho's discovery rule potentially.[2][3] Key factors: Utah mining expertise higher, both need causation proof.[1][3] Check your state's admin body first.[2] Lawyer knows local nuances.[8]
